title: Will they think for three? The development of the electoral system will be handed over to LMT, 'Tet' and 'Latvijas valsts meži' - Inbox.eu
summary_full: Will they think for three? The development of the electoral system will be handed over to LMT, 'Tet' and 'Latvijas valsts meži'  Inbox.euThe Prime Minister hopes that voters will not feel significant changes in the election process  Inbox.euLatvia’s election system handed over to state-owned companies at the last minute  Baltic News NetworkRIX Technologies loses contract; LMT, Tet and LVM could be tasked with developing election IT systems  The Baltic TimesLatvia’s election system reshuffled at the last minute – minister hopes everything will work  Baltic News Network
